Hang out with pioneers like Robby Naish, Jason Polakow, the Angulo brothers, as well as windsurfing's present rulers Levi Siver, Kauli Seadi and Daida Moreno. From board-shaping to riding big waves at Jaws and Hookipa, learn about the birthplace of a sport.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The mission is still imminent, but something pressing came up.. some really cool guns! This course of fire includes an amazing rifle, a man down and an opportunity to go full-auto. Then, Crossfire lets the team try out a tactical bat that includes a 22LR Pistol and a window breaker spike. If that’s not enough to get the blood pumping, the contestants try out a silencer fit for the most secretive of missions and a John Wick shotgun. Buckle up.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: From suppressors to a shotgun fresh off the movie set of John Wick 4, the contestants got spoiled this week with amazing tactical weapons. Mark Baylis, Green Beret, also sits down with our hosts to talk about his invaluable nonprofit that is changing the lives of hundreds of American Veterans.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The night mission is a go.. or so they thought. As the team readied for the night mission, word from HQ derails the plan. The team has to act fast to adapt to an ever-changing hostage situation. With an ingenious plan formed, some contestants have to go undercover to get the intel needed to complete the mission. See who this season's winner is on the nail-biter season finale of Surviving Mann.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: With the mission imminent, Chris and Cindy sit down with Danny and Kyle for some last words on how the competition has been going so far. With Kyle still nursing a brutal hamstring pull, he gives us some insight on his unique running method. Cindy also chats with Autumn from Stream2Sea about her revolutionary product the team used today to beat the Florida sun.

programme.title: All Stars

A bear crawl down a mountain, log running and two-point planks are just some of Don’s welcome gauntlet. And the cherry on top—a 5k desert run. But the contestants only have themselves to blame. Because when you’re already amongst the elite, you have to do whatever it takes to find the one who stands above the rest.

programme.title: S1E1 Two Roads
programme.desc:
“Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today.
This episode features Olympic bronze medalist Kristian Ipsen, American rugby union star Carlin Isles — celebrated as “The Fastest Man in Rugby” — and his remarkable rise from track and field and American football to becoming a two-time Olympian in rugby sevens. You’ll also meet Allison Stokke, a record-breaking high school pole vaulter who went on to compete at UC Berkeley, and Miles Chamley-Watson, a British-American fencing champion whose career includes 13 team Pan American titles, a 2019 team world championship, a 2013 individual world championship, three Olympic appearances, and a 2016 team Olympic bronze medal.

programme.title: The Dude Ranger 1934,
programme.desc: A wealthy Easterner inherits a Western ranch and goes undercover as a cowboy to investigate a corrupt foreman who is plotting to seize the property for himself

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E17 Henry Plummer
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark travels to the Montana territory to investigate a wave of violent stagecoach robberies. He soon discovers that the crimes are being orchestrated by the local sheriff himself, forcing Clark into a dangerous showdown to expose Henry Plummer as the leader of the ruthless outlaws he was sworn to catch

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E3 Frank and Jesse James
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark pursues the infamous James brothers across Missouri as they escalate their daring train robberies. Clark must outmaneuver the brothers' loyal network of supporters and navigate the public’s complicated perception of the outlaws to finally bring an end to their criminal spree

programme.title: Forbidden Trails 1941
programme.desc: The Rough Riders ride again in Forbidden Trails! When Marshal Buck Roberts (Buck Jones) is gunned down and badly wounded, he refuses to quit the fight. With fellow lawmen Tim McCoy and Raymond Hatton at his side, the trio saddles up to take on a ruthless gang terrorizing the frontier. Packed with blazing six-gun action, camaraderie, and justice served Western-style, this thrilling chapter in the Rough Riders series delivers nonstop excitement.

programme.title: Tulsa 1949
programme.desc: Set against the roaring Oklahoma oil boom of the 1920s, Stuart Heisler’s drama follows Cherokee Lansing, a rancher’s daughter driven by vengeance after her father’s death at the hands of ruthless oilmen. With the help of Native American Jim Redbird and rugged roustabout Brad Brady, Cherokee plunges headfirst into the high-stakes world of oil drilling—where ambition, betrayal, and desire fuel every move.

programme.title: The Range Busters 1940
programme.desc: Three cowboy heroes ride onto the screen in The Range Busters, the film that launched the legendary series! When murder and treachery strike on a sprawling ranch, Crash Corrigan, Dusty King, and Alibi Terhune team up to unmask the killers and restore justice. With quick-draw action, saddle humor, and even Alibi’s ventriloquist dummy ‘Elmer’ along for the ride, this lively Western delivers thrills, laughs, and plenty of frontier spirit.
